# ganhuo-ai-knowledge-commerce

> A Codex Skill for designing reproducible AI-assisted knowledge-commerce pipelines.

## What It Does

ganhuo-ai-knowledge-commerce helps creators, operators, consultants, educators, and small teams design a practical operating system for AI-assisted knowledge products. It covers source cards, knowledge bases, writing style,公众号 drafts, 知识星球 delivery, private-domain follow-up, and weekly data review.

Given a niche and available source material, it returns a pipeline brief with product positioning, source-card schema, knowledge-base structure,公众号 template, 知识星球 weekly rhythm, automation boundaries, and a 30/60/90-day rollout.

The goal is to improve content velocity, trust, source traceability, and paid conversion without turning AI rewriting into a shortcut for copied material.

- [Source Policy](https://github.com/yuanyuanyuan430/ganhuo-ai-knowledge-commerce/blob/main/references/source-policy.md)

## Best Use Cases

- Design a公众号 + 知识星球 content-to-paid pipeline.
- Turn messy research into source cards and a RAG knowledge base.
- Build an AI-assisted daily or weekly content workflow.
- Prepare prompts, checklists, and metrics for a knowledge-product team.
- Improve claims, proof, publishing rhythm, and conversion loops.
